cards.front: What is the primary goal of the 0/1 Knapsack Problem?
cards.back: To maximize the value of items in a knapsack without exceeding its capacity

cards.front: What is the time complexity of the naive recursive solution to the 0/1 Knapsack Problem?
cards.back: Explosionally high, making it impractical for large inputs

cards.front: What is the key insight that solves the 0/1 Knapsack Problem using Dynamic Programming?
cards.back: Breaking down the problem into smaller subproblems and storing their solutions to avoid redundant computation

cards.front: What is the name of the algorithm for the 0/1 Knapsack Problem that solves it in linear time?
What is the main advantage of using Dynamic Programming over other algorithms for the Knapsack Problem?
cards.back: It only stores the solutions to subproblems, requiring O(n) space and O(n) time
